success_surface: Hybrid tool approach with exploration-first strategy, constraint-aware range processing, and pattern-based data extraction
effective_behaviors: Used pandas for initial schema exploration before applying openpyxl modifications
Verified column positions using both names and indices before executing edits
Respected answer_position constraints to limit processing scope
Applied defensive programming for null/None cell values
Used regex pattern matching to extract numerical data from mixed text strings
Handled multiple extracted values with intelligent selection logic
Performed post-modification verification by reloading the saved workbook
Provided informative logging of execution progress and changes
evidence: First explored spreadsheet with pd.read_excel() to understand column structure and data format
Switched to openpyxl.load_workbook() for cell-level modifications to preserve formatting
Used min(last_row + 1, 22) to respect answer_position range D2:D21
Checked cell_e_value is None before proceeding with string conversion
Applied re.findall(r'\d+', cell_e_str) to extract numbers from text containing 'Check'
Selected last number sequence (numbers[-1]) when multiple numbers found after 'Check'
Reloaded output with pd.read_excel() after wb.save() to verify changes appeared correctly
Printed Row X: Updated summary for each successful modification

memory_items.title: Exploration Before Modification
memory_items.lesson: Use pandas to explore sheet structure, column names, and data types before committing to cell-level edits with openpyxl.
memory_items.generalization: Always load with pandas first to understand the schema, then switch to openpyxl for targeted modifications that require preserving formatting or formulas.

memory_items.title: Constraint-Aware Range Control
memory_items.lesson: Respect the specified answer_position range to avoid modifying rows outside the target scope.
memory_items.generalization: When an answer_position specifies a range, use it to bound iteration loops rather than processing the entire worksheet unnecessarily.

memory_items.title: Defensive Null Handling
memory_items.lesson: Always check for None/null values before converting cells to strings or applying transformations.
memory_items.generalization: Include empty/null value checks before any string operation or formula application to prevent runtime errors on incomplete data.

memory_items.title: Pattern-Based Data Extraction
memory_items.lesson: Use regex or string matching to extract structured data from unstructured text fields.
memory_items.generalization: When target values are embedded in text, apply pattern matching to isolate specific components (numbers, dates, codes) for downstream operations.

memory_items.title: Post-Edit Verification
memory_items.lesson: Reload and verify the output file after saving to confirm changes were applied as expected.
memory_items.generalization: After writing modifications, read back the result with pandas or openpyxl to validate that all intended changes persisted correctly.

edits.content:
## Trace-Derived Lessons

### Exploration Before Commitment
- Always explore sheet structure with `pandas` before making modifications with `openpyxl`
- Verify column names, data types, and ranges to avoid incorrect assumptions
- Switch tools strategically: pandas for analysis, openpyxl for cell-level editing

### Constraint-Aware Processing
- Respect specified answer_position ranges to limit unnecessary worksheet traversal
- Calculate loop bounds explicitly using both max_row and instruction-specified limits

### Defensive Cell Handling
- Check for None/null values before string conversion or transformation operations
- Handle missing data deterministically (skip, fill, or set blank based on context)

### Pattern-Based Extraction
- Use regex patterns to extract structured data (numbers, dates, codes) from unstructured text
- Implement intelligent selection when multiple matches exist (e.g., last match, first non-trivial)

### Post-Modification Verification
- Reload saved files to verify changes were persisted correctly
- Log progress during execution for traceability and debugging
